'''majate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yearly|yearly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yearly|yearly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| majate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:majate|majate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:majatesher|majatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:majatesherĂ«m|majatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:majatero|majatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:majateshĂ«|majateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:majateshĂ«m|majateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimajatero|gokimajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimajateshĂ«|gokimajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimajateshĂ«m|gokimajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomajankerom|gomajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomajankeshĂ«|gomajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomajankeshĂ«m|gomajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomajankeya|gomajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:majaterom|majaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:majatemu|majatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:majateya|majateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimajaterom|gokimajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimajatemu|gokimajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimajateya|gokimajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:majajate|majajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:majajatesher|majajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:majajatesherĂ«m|majajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:majajatero|majajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:majajateshĂ«|majajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:majajateshĂ«m|majajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimajajatero|gokimajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimajajateshĂ«|gokimajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimajajateshĂ«m|gokimajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomajajankerom|gomajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomajajankeshĂ«|gomajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomajajankeshĂ«m|gomajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomajajankeya|gomajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:majajaterom|majajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:majajatemu|majajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:majajateya|majajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimajajaterom|gokimajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimajajatemu|gokimajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimajajateya|gokimajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠte|mĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠtesher|mĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠtero|mĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠjĂŠtero|gokimĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠterom|mĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠtemu|mĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠjĂŠteya|mĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠjĂŠterom|gokimĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠjĂŠteya|gokimĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafjafte|mafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafjaftesher|mafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafjaftesherĂ«m|mafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafjaftero|mafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafjafteshĂ«|mafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafjafteshĂ«m|mafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafjaftero|gokimafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafjafteshĂ«|gokimafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafjafteshĂ«m|gokimafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafjafnkerom|gomafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafjafnkeshĂ«|gomafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafjafnkeshĂ«m|gomafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafjafnkeya|gomafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafjafterom|mafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafjaftemu|mafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafjafteya|mafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafjafterom|gokimafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafjaftemu|gokimafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafjafteya|gokimafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
